subject: Mareep, a small fluffy sheep-like creature, standing on grassy ground under bright sky
description: A small sheep-like creature with a large round woolly body and a yellow-blue striped tail stands on green grass beneath a bright open sky. The creature has a round button nose and small black eyes visible above the fluffy white fleece. The scene feels sunny and pastoral, with the yellow and white palette of the creature contrasting the green grass and light blue sky backdrop.
foreground: fluffy sheep-like creature on green grass
